L2_brief: Benjamin Looker, General Counsel of Esperion Therapeutics, sold 6,517 shares at $3.667 per share on December 17, 2025, totaling approximately $23,893. The sale was made to satisfy tax obligations on vesting restricted stock units, representing a routine non-discretionary transaction rather than a directional signal.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a tax-related sale triggered by RSU vesting, not a discretionary sale. The insider retains a substantial holding of 385,905 shares, indicating continued alignment with shareholders.
risks_flagged: Sale to cover tax withholding on RSU vesting - routine/non-discretionary
Relatively small disposal (~1.7% of post-transaction holdings)
